author: Willing to Wait!
content:
I know you said next time na lang we talk and I do wanna respect that but there are some things I've been wanting to say and I just don't want to keep them in. The first month we started talking is when I realized that I really did fall in love with you, I could feel it with an instant that you were my person. And if I'm being honest you are the best thing that ever happened to me.

Talking to you at that time made me realize how boring I really was, I started to live life to the fullest when I am around you. Being around you made me realize that being vulnerable to somebody isn't that bad. I started trusting you, being comfortable with you, pouring my heart out to you and of course trying my best to understand you.

Although yes that time it was pretty rough trying to understand you but it made me realize that you are worth all the trouble. YOU are my person Jodi, you are my calm to the storm, my reason in the chaos, my 11:11, the answer that I was not looking for, my exhale after a long day, the constant variable in a controlled experiment, my safe place in a world full of chaos and of course my six to my seven?

I also wanna be honest that I miss you every single time I'm not with you. And I know that might sound a lot for you, but I'm not asking for everything, I'm just letting you know that I just want once in a while. A moment here and there is really enough for me. I understand the reasons why you don't want anything at the moment, and I truly understand it. If you really just want to be friends for now, I can do that. If that's what it takes to still have you in my life, I'll take it. Because having you as a friend is still better than not having you at all.

And also I want you to know that I am willing to wait for you Jodi, I really do. I want to wait for you while you work on yourself, achieve your goals and of course finish your studies. I want to wait till you tell me it's enough or till you tell me that you are ready. I'm not going anywhere. I won't leave. I won't give up. And I will be here every single time you need me.

You can doubt it. You can try to push me away because you think I'll just leave anyway but that will never be true. I don't care if there is a hundred million reasons to leave, you are the only reason I'll ever need to stay. I'm really not playing any games here, I have no hidden agendas or whatsoever I just mean everything I am saying.

There's really no one like you Jodi, you are one of a kind and this may sound cliche or whatever but you complete me in ways I can't really explain. Like no matter how I try to put it right the feeling just keeps slipping beyond my sight. There's something about you that makes everything feel more bright and clear and though I don't understand it too but like what you said somehow I am more myself with you.

I love how alive you make things feel like every moment turns more real. The simplest days also became my favorite too just because I'm spending them with you. You bring a warmth I can't explain like sunshine breaking through the rain and somehow just by being you you make the whole world bloom anew.

I really do see a future in you Jodi, I see you as someone I would spend the rest of my time with. And whatever you decide, just know that every word I wrote here is real. I don't say things I don't mean. You deserve to know that.

author: ???? (Fuhh this Day)
content:
I really dont know what to do, I'm stuck on whether to just leave you alone and give you the space you need. Or find the answers to all the questions I have on my mind right now. First of all why Ew? What did I do to deserve an Ew? Like genuinely this threw me off jodi, it really did.

I gave my all to you, to us, I gave every inch of my love to whatever this is. I gave the fraction remaining, like the only pieces that are left in my heart to you. I'm a broken guy jodi, it's not fair that we only get to talk about you. How you are not mentally capable and that you tend to run away when things get hard.

Paano pa kaya ako? I gave everything to you, everything, yes I know you warned me and told me about it. But at least acknowledge me, its not fair eh Im also broken like you are. Im a broken good and to be honest you fucking complete me.

I want to spend the rest of my time with you jodi, I really do. I find comfort in you which I do not see from other people. You are one really unique person ieuejwlsudbsmpshenenb

As my eyes begin to fade while that cold lit cigarette make contact with my lips. I checked the clock, 11:34 PM, I scanned the crowd. Looking st everyone chit-chatting, laughing, talking, enjoying and grabbing at the night they actually belong to. And here I was in a dark corner sitting below a very dim light. Bottle in hand and a cigarette on the other, asking myself what am I even doing here?

This life is never meant for me, and then of course, I thought of you. I thought of all the things I could have done differently, all those moments where I could have fought harder. I want to fight for us, I really do. I want to call you right now and tell you everything you need to know about you and I. But I also know you need me to respect what ever you decide, even if it breaks me.

I missed everything about you jodi, especially the way we use to talk. The way we used to play around each other like the world isn't watching when we hang out. To be honest, from the bottom of my heart, I missed every single moment we have spent time together. Even the small ones, especially the small ones.

And your eyes, Jodi… I dont think you would ever understand what your eyes do to me. They are honestly the most beautiful thing I've ever seen in my life. And on nights like that, me sitting in a dark corner missing you. The only thing that could kept me at bay is the moon. It's because thats the only closest thing I have looking at you.

And in that moment, looking at that damn moon while ignoring the noise and the smoke. I kept asking myself, what if I just had been honest at the start? Would this be any different? Would we still be talking? I dont know why I think about it more than I should.

The lie I just told you is something that I carry everyday, and I won't make excuses for it. But in every single perspective you look at. I want to make sure that you dont get the wrong idea. That man that told that lie is not someone I want to be for you. You made me want to be the best version of myself, you still do.

author: Ink and Tears
content:
hellloooo jodi, ive written to you alot already to be honest its probably because I cant express the feelings I want to express during the moment. It takes me a while for me to actually gather what I want to say. It doesn't mean that my feelings for you is not that deep. Its just that my love does not alter when alteration finds me. But of course when I do find the words that expresses my feelings, it always had the will to come back to you.

I know you are thinking that somehow you will hurt me and that you are not emotionally capable right now and of course I understand and hear you. But if Im being for real, I dont need you to be perfect jodi, i dont need you to have it all together. I just need you to not just give up on me like that, when you know we had a real chance.

Why do you think you are a distraction to me? You're actually the reason everyday I want to be better than the man I was the other day. And I know deep down in your guarded heart you know that what we have going on is something that does not come around often. And yes I also admit it that I am a distraction to you, but id rather be beside you through everything your chasing and supporting you rather than someone you let go off just to find out it was not worth it in the long run.

Of course jodi im not asking you to choose me over your goals, career, friends, family but im asking you to let me be part of your journey. Of course I want you the please know my intensions to you are the purest of pure. I see a future in you jodi, I really do, not just tomorrow, not just next month but the kind of future where Im choosing you everyday.

even if you are lucy (50 first dates) id still get up , show up and make you fall for me all over again, every single day without hesitation. But i also see YOU. I see someone who is working so hard for her career, someone who has a bigger purpose in life, and if im being honest I dont want to be the reason you ever lose that sight. I dont want to be your priority right now its obviously going to be your dreams and goals in life.

I just want to be the person whos there when life beats you into a pulp, who celebrates your small wins with you. I would never ask to be first in your list Im just asking to be a part of it. As you know, all those times we spent together, I treasure it more than you know. I know you said this alot of times na you just dont let anyone in but i know how guarded you are, and honestly that feels every moment you give me something that i never want to take for granted.

Im not going to pretend that Im mr perfect like Im Ken or something but I know I lied to you twice and thats something I carry. But I need you to know thats the only thing ive been keeping from you. You deserve nothing but honesty from me and of course I mean it talaga. All i want is to try to become the person you feel safe with and the person who makes your guard down not forcefully but because you are willing to.

Im also scared too, im scared of letting you go. Im scared of just watching something this real just go away. So maybe we are both scared but of course Id rather face that with you than run away from it. Hamlet once said doubt thou the stars are fire, doubt that the sun doth move, doubt truth to be a liar, but I never doubt the feelings I carry for you Jodi. You can doubt the timing, whether this makes sense right now, but please never doubt what I feel for you.

It's honestly the only realest feeling I've ever had. I dont know what tomorrow looks like but I ask you to let me be part of it. And of course if you ever find it in yourself to stop running from this, I'll be always here, Im not going anywhere and thats a promise I want to keep.

author: What's With You?
content:
Your different jodi, you really are. I enjoy every single time we talk together and hangout. I cherish even small moments with you. I don't tell you this enough but, every time I look at you I'm really scared of losing you. I always think how bad will I really miss you if you were gone. It is overwhelming for me in the softest way.

I love the way you roll your eyes at me when you are annoyed. Not that I like annoying you but it's just so you. I love the way we just either stare at each other giggling or putting out our tounges saying blehhh if we have nothing to say to each other. I cherish every late night calls we have whenever we felt like talking to each other. I could say a 100 things about this but I'll say one last thing. Those deep talks we have occasionally is something I really enjoy. It's fun getting to know you in a deeper level.

I want to earn your trust, make you feel safe and comfortable around me. Theres a gazillion girls in the whole wide world you are probably wondering why you? It's just that our energy matches, it's like a puzzle thats perfectly fitted. And to be honest? I'm afraid that I love you too much more than I know how to hold and it honestly scares me. But I really dont want to hold back to you.

Before you I realize how much of a annoying guy I could be. I learned how to speak softer because of you. I pick up manners that you do on a day to day basis and now I dont want to go back to the person I was before you. I like spending time with you irl not just in calls. Im even shocked that you think Im ignoring you but to be honest. I dont see you as someone who's approachable and honestly that is what pissed me off. Because deep down I know that you are naman, I'm just self sabotaging myself.

I honestly didin't even see my self as someone who'd write alot for a girl. I think you are bukod tangi and you made me do alot of things I did not think I would do. This is too long so I'll say something last na. I know na I have alot of mistakes in the past and I regret most of it. It's mostly my fault for all of that so if loving you is the one right thing i get right in this life thats enough for me.

I dont believe in other versions of the world but just for you I'd choose you in every version there is. I wish i met you 3 years ago..

Ive always wondered how people get addicted to substances until I met her. We all know that cigarettes, vapes, weed, and etc come with warning labels. This one specifically stated she had warning labels and well I did not listen. I've always thought that if I loved her enough I would maybe change her. Looking back to it now well, I've realized I was probably not the only one who had said this exact words.

They say confidence is key, if you are confident with your abilities you will truly overcome it. It's been six months and I dont even think I had made any progress yet. I feel disappointed at myself not knowing how to let go of this stupid thing we have going on. Apart of me wants to stay and hope that she really is trying to improve herself and let me understand her better. But the other part of myself wants to just let go for once, he's tired, helpless, no hope at all.

She had the audacity to make fun of men who go to the gym because they are sad and listen to sad music. Whether she knew it or not but this exact statement is like her pointing a gun at me and shooting the damn gun. I never really knew how much a girl would affect me but it's taking a toll at me. If you would compare this with someone who's frequently using meth, you could clearly see the similarities. Degrading mental and physical health is probably the most obvious thing you could see.

This is why I said love is really an addiction.

author: The Letter That Almost Ended Everything :(
content:
Hi jodi, im not the type of person to write this long ass message but looks like I am now. As you already know I like you, this past months we have been talking I started to gain feelings for you. Although deep down I knew that this wont be going anywhere further than friends I still hoped it would. I don't blame you for accidentally leading me on as you said on the message u sent previously, for me I think thats just how you really are. One of the many things why I like you, you're really outgoing.

The fact that we could talk for hours without stopping is one of the reasons I enjoy your company. I could easily say a hundred things on why I like you but that's simply not why I wrote this thing in the first place. I just wanted to say beneath those happy times there were really shitty times. Sorry for lying to you, but I really just don't think I'll be happy continuing to talk to you. Having someone you really like but you know you can't have really close to you bothers me quite a bit. Especially on how outgoing you are and my stupid ass thinking everything is a sign or whatever.

As you can't tell I'm really anxious, You may think that I look unbothered about stuff and all that but in reality I'm lost and confused. It hurts me saying this but you're really intensifying it. How you may say? I really am confused on what we have going on here bro. Thats what makes it worse for me. So to be honest I think talking to you will just make everything worse.

But hey at least there were still pros of continuing to talk to you but of course pros do come with cons and that is your inconsistency. I don't know if you're doing this intentionally or not but you're really hot and cold. Apart of me thinks your just playing me and apart of me thinks your not and thats just how you really are. I'm not the type of person to listen to friends because thats always how things are ruined but looking at it now maybe just maybe they are right? But of course I still think they aren't because I trust my own judgement but still haha I think they are right.

So let me get this straight it hurts to say this but I want to go back to when we never really got close at the first place. To summarize it, I want my old self back. This really rearranged my whole world and I don't feel like myself anymore. Funny thing to say is that I feel the same shit of what I had felt last year. I fought my way out of it and somehow somewhat I'm back at it again haha.

It will really be painful for me but it will be okay I'd get over it but continuing to talk to you well yikes my anxious self could never. So I'm very sorry but it just has to be this way. Don't you worry about my mental health after this by the way. Although you are somewhat apart of the reason why its shit its okay Im big enough to get over it. Don't worry about it that much, I had this my whole life and dealt it on my own it's fine.

Okay so yeah I think I poured everything I'm feeling in this message. Best of luck to you and hope we still are on good terms but please dont get too close to me again or we are back to square 1. Sadly to say you are my kryptonite and what I felt for you is really real and I thought it would go long but I guess I was wrong. Shout out to my friend bea reminding me karmas really a bitch 😭🙏

author: Bars From Mars!
content:
To that girl that I can never confess to. I would rather lose the chance to be with you than losing you in general. My heart aches whenever I even think about it. Those late night calls, to those playful conversations during daylight. These are things that I cant truly lose.

Whenever I think about you it makes my day shine bright like a diamond. But when I'm spending time with you in person, that's happiness money really can't buy. Your eyes are like gems that are worth a-lot. It's like grandparents welcoming you to their house. It's something that invites myself to approach you. It radiates warmth whenever you listen to me with those eyes.

They reflect like glass when light strikes directly at them. It's really beautiful indeed. Another thing that separates you from the others is your colorful personality. It's like shuffling a card and picking from the top, you never really know what you're going to get. It's like a bean boozle but there are no bad tasting jelly beans. It's something that truly keeps a man at bay, and your personality rubs off to other people.

Your smile I can never truly forget, with a face like yours I can't help but ask why hide your smile? Seeing you smile, be happy and laugh is something that makes my day. A pretty girl like you should never hide your smile. Show it out to the world, don't care about what others think. For me I think that your smile is one of the things that complete you as a person.

author: My First Letter! (Don't Judge Pls...)
content:
Shup ella, I've been meaning to tell you something that has been bothering me. But the thing is I already know what the outcome will be but not telling you feels like hell so here it is. I don't expect to get anything from you from this long ahh message but what I just want to say is that no matter what you read in this message promise me this won't change your perspective about me.

I really enjoy hanging around with you like those times when you had a hard time in math and would ask me about it, small talks in the classrooms and those other stuff. Talking with you also sa text is enjoying lah even if there's some days na leaves me thinking what we really are you know? But those days are behind me. I accepted that I have no chance with you at all although it used to crush me so bad but now it's something that I treasure i guess since i completely accepted it.

What really started this whole thing was that time when we watched the uaap finals with jericho, nicole and that one girl i forgot her name luna? I remember that it was December 10? It was really fun y'know and I got to know your side too and all that stuff. The point is this is where my interest skyrocketed cause around you i felt like i did not need to suppress my usual side cause you had the exact same side I have. This is the time where it all led.

It was like a domino effect here ah, this is where I really got to know your personality but not you which crushed me the most since I really wanted to have those deep talks with you. Believe it or not I did throw a few chucks every now and then to test the waters if you would reciprocate the same feeling I had. But this is where it went downhill cause I started realizing na oh, I dont think she likes me as a partner. I pieced everything together and realized that I was just a friend.

It sucked for the first few weeks or so but I had accepted it. My mom always used to say to be grateful for what you have always. So I did, I just wanted to tell you this because it's affecting our friendship since it's making me sad about it. I still want to be friends with you jodi like nothing changed. Please dont think I became friends with you guys just to get close to you. Do not ever think of that because realizing it now I do value our friendship and it generated me a-lot of happiness being around you and yana.

I really like you jodi so it's up to you to do whatever you want. Either choice is REALLY FINE FOR ME. Don't overthink it please and dont let this ruin our friendship. I'm just asking formally if I can court you. If it is not obvious enough I've been catching feelings for you and I wanna take things a long way with you and go forward together and also going forward myself as a man.

So please do what you please. I am fine with any outcome and do not feel pressured. I just wanted to get this out of my chest so if it's a no then it's a no. I'd still be happy to offer friendship instead 😁.
